# create.txt — af create end-to-end through fake git + tmux + pi.
#
# A smart fake git (at $WORK/mygit/git) answers the exact queries the
# create pipeline issues (ADR-038/ADR-039):
#   rev-parse --show-toplevel        → $WORK/repo (must exist: later git
#                                      calls run with cmd.Dir set to it)
#   config --get remote.origin.url   → https://github.com/kakkoyun/demo.git
#   config --get remote.upstream.url → exit 1 (no fork upstream remote)
#   rev-parse --verify upstream/main → exit 1 (miss)
#   rev-parse --verify origin/main   → hit → chosen as the base branch
#   worktree add ...                 → exit 0 (no real checkout needed;
#                                      EnsureStateSymlink mkdirs the path)
# tmux + pi remain the passthrough fakes from $WORK/fakebin, so the
# tmux new-session / set-environment / send-keys calls all succeed.
#
# testscript's `exec` never gives the child a real controlling TTY, so
# every create below is "non-interactive" per af's own detection
# (isTerminalReader/isTerminalWriter) — create prints the issue #25
# next-steps footer instead of attaching, and the fake tmux never sees
# an attach-session call.

env HOME=$WORK/home

chmod 755 mygit/git
env PATH=$WORK/mygit:$PATH

# ── Success: af create demo scaffolds state + ledger + worktree ──────────────
# Defaults: agent=pi, worktree_root=~/Workspace/.worktrees,
# prefix_on_fork_only=true + no upstream remote → branch == session name.

exec af create demo
stdout 'created workstream demo'
stdout 'branch:    demo'
stdout 'worktree:'
stdout 'tmux:      af-demo   \(attach: af resume demo\)'

# Non-interactive (no TTY): the next-steps footer prints, not an attach.
stdout 'to attach:   af resume demo     \(or: tmux attach -t af-demo\)'
stdout 'to check in: af status'
stdout 'to finish:   af done demo'

# No config.toml exists, so [obsidian] notes_vault defaults to empty
# (issue #17): the note step is skipped, and af create says so exactly
# once on stderr rather than silently dropping it.
stderr -count=1 'note: Obsidian integration is disabled \(notes_vault is empty'

# Durable state lands under the v1 sessions dir.
exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/state.toml
exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/ledger.jsonl
grep 'name = "demo"' $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/state.toml
grep 'status = "active"' $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/state.toml
grep 'base_branch = "origin/main"' $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/state.toml
grep 'repo_slug = "github.com/kakkoyun/demo"' $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/state.toml
grep 'tmux_session = "af-demo"' $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/state.toml

# The ledger records the create event with the resolved agent.
grep '"event":"created"' $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/ledger.jsonl
grep '"agent":"pi"' $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/ledger.jsonl

# Discovery symlink is reconciled inside the planned worktree path.
exists $HOME/Workspace/.worktrees/github.com/kakkoyun/demo/demo/.af/state.toml

# ── Failure: path-escaping session name is rejected up front ─────────────────
! exec af create ../evil
stderr 'invalid session name'

# No state directory may leak out of the rejected create.
! exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/evil

# ── Failure: path-escaping AF_SESSION is rejected for EVERY command ──────────
# (issue #15) — even ones that never consume the variable, like list.
env AF_SESSION=../../etc
! exec af list
stderr 'invalid session name'
env AF_SESSION=

# ── Failure: strict name collision (ADR-069 §3) ──────────────────────────────
! exec af create demo
stderr 'already in use'

-- repo/.keep --
-- mygit/git --
#!/bin/sh
# Smart fake git for the af create pipeline. Answers the exact argv
# sequences issued by cmd/af/create.go + internal/lifecycle.Create.
case "$*" in
  'rev-parse --show-toplevel')
    echo "$WORK/repo"
    exit 0
    ;;
  'config --get remote.origin.url')
    echo 'https://github.com/kakkoyun/demo.git'
    exit 0
    ;;
  'config --get remote.upstream.url')
    exit 1
    ;;
  'rev-parse --verify upstream/main')
    exit 1
    ;;
  'rev-parse --verify origin/main')
    echo 'abc1234deadbeef'
    exit 0
    ;;
  'worktree add'*)
    exit 0
    ;;
  *)
    exit 0
    ;;
esac
